official_experiments.access_method: git cat-file --batch; exact prediction, result, and requested log blobs only

historical_evaluator.subject: Add empty patch case in eval

historical_semantics.prediction_iteration: JSONL lines are processed in order without deduplication.
historical_semantics.empty_patch: Both null and whitespace-only strings enter no_generation.
historical_semantics.log_lookup: Each non-empty line reads <instance_id>.<run>.eval.log; duplicate lines reuse the same log.
historical_semantics.no_apply: Either pred_try or pred_minimal_try apply-failure marker is sufficient.
